---
title: "Causal internals"
toc: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

This page documents the causal pipeline for contributors.

## Objects

A causal fit typically contains:
- treatment-arm fit
- control-arm fit
- (optional) propensity score model output
- derived estimands (`qte()`, `ate()` objects) and their summaries

## Computation outline

1. Build a causal bundle (`build_causal_bundle()`), optionally including a PS sub-bundle.
2. Run MCMC (`run_mcmc_causal()`), producing a causal fit object.
3. Compute estimands (`qte()`, `ate()`), optionally for new covariates.

## Important constraint

{{< include _includes/golden-rules.md >}}
